<?php namespace Illuminate\Cache\Console; use Illuminate\Cache\CacheManager; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputArgument; #[AsCommand(name: 'cache:prune-stale-tags')] class PruneStaleTagsCommand extends Command { /** * The console command name. * * @var string */ protected $name = 'cache:prune-stale-tags'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Prune stale cache tags from the cache (Redis only)'; /** * Execute the console command. * * @param \Illuminate\Cache\CacheManager $cache * @return int|null */ public function handle(CacheManager $cache) { $cache = $cache->store($this->argument('store')); if (method_exists($cache->getStore(), 'flushStaleTags')) { $cache->flushStaleTags(); } $this->components->info('Stale cache tags pruned successfully.'); } /** * Get the console command arguments. * * @return array */ protected function getArguments() { return [ ['store', InputArgument::OPTIONAL, 'The name of the store you would like to prune tags from'], ]; } }
